overview: AgentHire is an AI-powered freelance hiring platform with a modern SaaS dashboard. Post projects, discover freelancers with AI-powered matching, and hire with a seamless payment flow.
features: Landing page with hero, features, and how-it-works sections
First-time user onboarding wizard with progress steps
Dashboard with sidebar navigation and user info
Post project form with validation and mock API
Freelancer discovery with AI recommendation badge and match score
Hire workflow with confirmation modal and mock payment
Payment success page with Algorand Testnet badge
Editable profile page with avatar, bio, and skills
Toast notifications for all async actions
